ddls:
CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "decision_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the decision */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting where the decision was made */,
  "decision_text" TEXT /* Text of the decision made */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Location where the meeting took place */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision (e.g., proposed, approved, rejected) */,
  "decision_category" TEXT /* Category of the decision (e.g., strategic, operational) */,
  "decision_owner" TEXT /* Person or team responsible for the decision */,
  "decision_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the decision (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the meeting */,
  "meeting_type" TEXT /* Type of the meeting (e.g., In-session, Electronic) */,
  "thematic_area" TEXT /* Thematic area of the meeting */,
  "agenda_item" TEXT /* Agenda item number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meeting */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meeting */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the meeting */,
  "secretary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secretary of the meeting */,
  "participant_ids" TEXT /* IDs of participants attending the meeting */,
  "meeting_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the meeting */,
  "meeting_status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Summary, Report) */,
  "document_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the document */,
  "document_text" TEXT /* Text content of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "document_lock" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is locked for editing */,
  "document_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., board member, secretary, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to (e.g., decisions, documents) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action the user can perform (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text content of the document version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_version_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
